top_selected_prompts: Please describe this artwork thoroughly.
Detail the image's components with particular focus on each entity.
Create a thorough description describing the given image. Include the text contents and the information they convey in the description.
What are the key features you observe in the image?
Explain the elements of the image with thorough attention to detail.
Give a comprehensive description of this artwork, from its visual elements to its conceptual meaning.
Tell me what catches your eye in the image, and describe those elements in depth.
Provide a detailed narrative of the image, emphasizing the visible celebrities and the scene.
Explain the image's various components in depth.
Detail the texts and other components in the image in depth, explaining their relevance to the overall picture.
Can you point out the details that make this image unique?
Describe the key features of the image in great detail.
Create a detailed description describing the elements of the given worldwide landmark image. Identify the name of the landmark and describe the objects, colors, perspectives, etc.
Provide an intricate description of every entity in the image.
What are the main elements in this image? Describe them thoroughly.
Create a detailed description describing the contents of the given art image. Include the objects, colors, art style, art genre, etc.
Identify and describe each object in the image in detail.
What type of book is this?
Explain what's happening in the image with as much detail as possible.
Describe this landmark in detail, highlighting its unique aspects, location, and the experience of visiting it.
